instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to create, scaffold, or refactor a Rails engine.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to create, scaffold, or refactor a Rails engine.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger create-engine.

instructions.instruction: A good engine has a narrow purpose, a clear host-app integration story, and a small public API. Keep this skill focused on structure and design. Use adjacent skills for installer details, deep test coverage, release workflow, or documentation work.
instructions.original_snippets: A good engine has a narrow purpose, a clear host-app integration story, and a small public API. Keep this skill focused on structure and design. Use adjacent skills for installer details, deep test coverage, release workflow, or documentation work.
